title: hieracium murorum subsp. dentifolium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. dentifolium is a plant species, also known as a type of hawkweed, characterized by its distinctive toothed leaves and small yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. dentifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
